_comment: TEST-ONLY fictional coverage check for the P35 task tracker (S6). Two divergent media transcripts of the same sponsored video are reconciled to a canonical truth (one credible conflict: trail vs hiking), then the required talking points are verified against it. Sponsorship disclosure and the discount-code line are satisfied with extractive citations; a fictional return-policy point is absent, so the tool abstains rather than inferring. No real brand or person.

sources.text: welcome back everyone today northwind gear sent me their spring trail pack this video is sponsored by northwind use code save twenty at checkout
welcome back everyone today northwind gear sent me their spring hiking pack this video is sponsored by northwind use code save twenty at checkout

required_points.text: explains the thirty day return policy
